rag_rules: Use `assume "label": expression;` to express input assumptions.
Place assumptions and guarantees within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts are scoped to their owning component declaration.
Use visible identifiers from the model index; do not invent names.
For type-level contracts, base assumptions/guarantees on concrete bounds or visible relations.
anti_patterns: Do not include AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants.
Avoid using subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
